full_text:
Wang Yi 王異
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Yi (王異). Rebuked her husband so he would fight Ma Chao but lost her son. Took part in city defence. Wang Yi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
